---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for VortexFlow AI
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: "Rafsan1711"
---

## 💡 Feature Summary

<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like. -->

## 🎯 Motivation / Problem

<!-- What problem does this feature solve? What is the use case?
     Example: "I'm always frustrated when..." or "Currently there is no way to..." -->

## 🛠️ Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the solution you'd like. How should it work? What should the UI/UX look like? -->

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds? -->

## 📸 Mockups / Examples

<!-- If applicable, add sketches, screenshots, or links to similar features in other apps. -->

## 📋 Additional Context

<!-- Any other context, links, or information about the feature request. -->

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues and this feature has not been requested before.
- [ ] I am willing to help implement this feature (optional).
